Only accepts tennis balls; unsure how to tag.
Steven Nelson Kingsley Oct. 5, 1949-March 12, 2002 All your life you were Waiting to be free, FLY
The bench this outlet is on is not street furniture, so support=street_furniture:bench as mentioned at OSMWiki seems not fitting.
Lisa and Douglas Goldman Tennis Center

SF Rec & Parks (the relevant authority) has no record of this road being named Pompei Circle, so the name appears to be fictitious, but it's been in online sources for a long time and should be retained to support those who adopted it.
Doesn't seem to exist as of latest Bing aerial imagery
Does not yet appear on Bing imagery as of June 2021

Please create/move all new waypoints and routes in the appropriate regional relation (as defined by https://ridgetrail.org). Thank you!
The Bay Area Ridge Trail Council
Please only include routes and waypoints from http://ridgetrail.org See https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Bay_Area_Ridge_Trail for more information.
Bay Area Ridge Trail - 04 - San Francisco and Peninsula
Common name for car-free routes designated in 2022. Despite the name, not all segments are on JFK Drive and some segments still allow non-thru private vehicle traffic.
Golden Gate Park Shuttle: Haight Stanyan => Transverse
Golden Gate Park Shuttle: Stow Lake Boathouse => Haight Stanyan
